message:
fix(codegen): skip complex patterns in Zig codegen

- Change if_target_block to if_target_blocks stack to handle nested if statements
- Add check to skip Zig codegen for functions with:
  - Multiple depth-0 loops (causes interleaved switch arms)
  - Contaminated blocks inside loops (async/await patterns)
- These functions fall back to C codegen which handles them correctly

All key benchmarks still pass:
- fib: 3358ms
- loop: 51ms
- typed_array: 49ms
- average: 503ms
- tail_recursive: 80ms
